sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Grappling System
special_mechanics.description: Timing-based grappling control system that is the primary distinguishing feature of the Fire Pro Wrestling series. Encourages complex strategy and building up to increasingly powerful moves.

special_mechanics.name: Wrestling Match Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Professional wrestling game featuring various match types with flexible rules and wrestler positioning mechanics

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantitative physics parameters documented. Source material is a Wikipedia overview of the Fire Pro Wrestling series which focuses on gameplay features, match types, and character customization rather than movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics. This is a professional wrestling game where character movement is not the primary mechanical focus—grappling and turn-based wrestling mechanics take precedence.
sources_used: Fire Pro Wrestling - Wikipedia (series overview page)
